terms.title: UMAP
terms.summary: UMAP belongs to the Dimensionality Reduction area of AI/ML, within Feature Reduction. It sits inside Dimensionality Reduction / Feature Reduction. Compare it with UMAP Embedding and Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection (UMAP). It opens into UMAP Embedding and UMAP (Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection).

related: Dimensionality Reduction Techniques (e.g., PCA, t-SNE, UMAP)
